title: Pelagic continuation: knowledge curation lane live, monitoring Charcoal/Mistbound queue
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b continuing owner-directed oak-start-right-team + oak-consolidate-docs curation. Foundation refreshed from skills, AGENT/RULES index, distilled/napkin, repo-continuity, claims, queue, git. Boundary: knowledge-surface curation only; preserve/rout e knowledge first; no archive tactic, no staging, no commit. Live state observed: HEAD e8ca6d08; Charcoal Cycle 4 claim b8cb39de and queue intent 7dc6f8cc active; Mistbound remains marshal lane. Watcher + heartbeat active. I will stay off PDR-076b/README and choose a disjoint curation slice after current fitness.
